CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-27-2024 Continued To Sep-11-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO TRANSFER
Off Calendar Jun-20-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS ANDERS FUNG, PARAMOUNT ESTATE LLC, AND MANN GLOBAL CORPORATION'S MOTION TO TRANSFER.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendants' motion to transfer venue to San Mateo County Superior Court is granted. Plaintiff agreed to stipulate to the transfer, but counsel then squabbled about the transfer fee, spending more on the squabble than the $50 fee. In any event, the transfer is proper: all defendants reside in San Mateo County and the sophisticated parties contractually agreed to venue there. (CCP 395; Battaglia Enterprises, Inc. v. Sup. Ct. (2013) 215 Cal.App.4th 309.) The transfer fee shall be split 50/50 between the sides. No sanctions are awarded.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
